steps: "File dividend tax refund claim with Dutch Belastingdienst using IB 92 Universeel Form for EUR 22,193.60 excess withholding on Unilever NV dividend",
"Submit supporting documentation: custodian statement showing 25% withholding, Norwegian tax residency certificate, and treaty claim under NL-NO agreement Article 10",
"Reference treaty Article 10 limiting withholding to 15% on portfolio dividends for Norwegian residents",
"Follow up with ABN AMRO Custody to ensure they process any required treaty relief documentation for future Unilever dividends"

references.title: Belastingdienst – Recipient of Dividend Outside Netherlands – Refund
